prerequisites: A Persona account with access to the Persona Dashboard (https://app.withpersona.com/dashboard).
An API key generated in the Dashboard. Sign up gives immediate access to a sandbox API key; production access requires contacting Persona.
The api_key value, which is the only required configuration field for this connector.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Persona authenticates API requests with an API key sent in the Authorization header as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). This connector maps that key to its single required secret field, api_key. Keys are environment-specific: sandbox keys are for testing and production keys are used with live data.

setupSteps.title: Sign in to the Persona Dashboard
setupSteps.body: Log in at https://app.withpersona.com/dashboard. If you do not yet have an account, sign up to get immediate access to a sandbox environment and API key. For live data, contact Persona to enable production access.

setupSteps.title: Locate or create an API key
setupSteps.body: In the Dashboard, go to API > API Keys (https://app.withpersona.com/dashboard/api-keys). Existing keys are listed here, and you can copy a key with the Copy button. Choose the correct environment (Sandbox for testing, Production for live data).

setupSteps.title: Configure key permissions (optional)
setupSteps.body: To restrict what the key can access, open the key under API > API Keys > Edit > Permissions in the Dashboard and set the abilities permitted to that key. Persona notes that API keys carry many privileges, so keep them secure.

setupSteps.title: Provide the key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Set the connector's required api_key field to your Persona API key. The connector sends it as an Authorization: Bearer token on each request to the Persona API.

sources.title: Create an API key - Persona Docs
